stories.title: Add optional baselineCheck and lineage fields to ExecutionPlan schema

acceptanceCriteria.description: ExecutionPlan interface has optional baselineCheck field of type string
Story interface has optional lineage field with tier and sourceId
Validation accepts plans with baselineCheck field without errors
Validation accepts stories with lineage field without errors
Existing validation tests still pass (backward compatibility)
TypeScript compilation succeeds with new fields

stories.title: Define GenerateResult, GenerationBrief, FixBrief, and Escalation type interfaces

acceptanceCriteria.description: GenerateResult interface exported with action, storyId, iteration, maxIterations fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface GenerateResult' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'action:' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: GenerationBrief interface exported with story, codebaseContext, gitBranch, baselineCheck fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface GenerationBrief' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'gitBranch' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: FixBrief interface exported with failedCriteria, score, evalHint, guidance fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface FixBrief' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'evalHint' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: Escalation interface exported with reason enum, description, hypothesis, lastEvalVerdict, scoreHistory, diagnostics fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface Escalation' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'scoreHistory' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: EscalationDiagnostics interface exported with exitCode, stderr, failingTests fields (REQ-15)
CostEstimate interface exported with briefTokens, projectedIterationCostUsd, projectedRemainingCostUsd fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface CostEstimate' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'projectedIterationCostUsd' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: DiffManifest interface exported with changed, unchanged, new fields (REQ-14)
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface DiffManifest' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'changed.*string' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation succeeds
loadPlan function exported from server/lib/plan-loader.ts
evaluate.ts imports loadPlan from plan-loader (no longer defines its own)
loadPlan handles planJson precedence over planPath
Existing evaluate tests still pass after extraction
TypeScript compilation succeeds
buildBrief returns GenerationBrief with story object from plan matching storyId
buildBrief returns codebaseContext string from scanCodebase
buildBrief returns gitBranch as feat/{storyId} (e.g. feat/US-01 for storyId US-01)
buildBrief returns baselineCheck from plan or defaults to 'npm run build && npm test'
buildBrief throws or returns error for non-existent storyId
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'buildBrief.*not found\|buildBrief.*invalid' 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed'

stories.title: Implement fix brief assembly with eval hints and diff manifest (REQ-02, REQ-13, REQ-14)

acceptanceCriteria.description: buildFixBrief extracts only FAIL criteria from eval report (skips PASS and SKIPPED)
computeScore returns PASS/non-SKIPPED ratio (e.g. 2 PASS, 1 FAIL, 1 SKIPPED = 0.667)
fixBrief.evalHint.failFastIds lists AC IDs ordered by priority (functionality first)
buildDiffManifest computes changed/unchanged/new arrays from current vs previous fileHashes
diffManifest is omitted when iteration is 0 (init call)
Each failed criterion includes id, description, and evidence fields

stories.title: Implement all 5 stopping conditions (REQ-03, REQ-04, REQ-05, REQ-07, REQ-15)

acceptanceCriteria.description: Plateau detection: previousScores [0.5, 0.5, 0.5] triggers escalation with reason 'plateau'
No-op detection: matching fileHashes triggers escalation with reason 'no-op'
Max iterations: iteration >= maxIterations triggers escalation with reason 'max-iterations'
INCONCLUSIVE: verdict INCONCLUSIVE triggers immediate escalation regardless of other conditions
Baseline-failed: escalation includes diagnostics with exitCode, stderr (truncated to 2000 chars), and failingTests
Continue when improving: previousScores [0.3, 0.5] does NOT trigger any stopping condition
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'continue when improving\|continue.*improving' 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed'

acceptanceCriteria.description: INCONCLUSIVE takes precedence over all other stopping conditions
Plateau boundary case: previousScores [0.3, 0.5, 0.5] triggers plateau (improving then stuck)
Every escalation contains reason, description, hypothesis, lastEvalVerdict, and scoreHistory
Escalation description is specific to the failure reason (not generic)
Baseline-failed escalation has diagnostics; other reasons do not
assembleGenerateResult with no evalReport returns action 'implement' with GenerationBrief
assembleGenerateResult with FAIL evalReport returns action 'fix' with FixBrief when no stopping conditions met
assembleGenerateResult with PASS evalReport returns action 'pass'
assembleGenerateResult with stopping condition returns action 'escalate' with Escalation
All PH-01 unit tests pass together
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts server/lib/plan-loader.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed'

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation succeeds with all PH-01 code
